title: centaurea mouterdei
intro: Centaurea mouterdei, also known as Syrian cornflower or Mouterde's knapweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Centaurea mouterdei include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
